segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: How fast did the winning car go?

translations.zh-Hans: 获胜的汽车开得有多快？

segments.text: Once a year, a race is held for old cars.

translations.zh-Hans: 每年举行一次老式汽车比赛。

segments.text: A lot of cars entered for this race last year, and there was a great deal of excitement just before it began.

translations.zh-Hans: 去年许多汽车参加了这项比赛，比赛开始前人们异常兴奋。

segments.text: One of the most handsome cars was a Rolls-Royce Silver Ghost.

translations.zh-Hans: 最漂亮的汽车之一是一辆劳斯莱斯“银鬼”。

segments.text: The most unusual car was a Benz which had only three wheels.

translations.zh-Hans: 最不同寻常的是一辆只有三个轮子的奔驰汽车。

segments.text: Built in 1885, it was the oldest car taking part.

translations.zh-Hans: 它制造于1885年，是参赛车辆中最古老的一辆。

segments.text: After a great many loud explosions, the race began.

translations.zh-Hans: 一连串震耳欲聋的爆炸声过后，比赛开始了。

segments.text: Many of the cars broke down on the course, and some drivers spent more time under their cars than in them.

translations.zh-Hans: 许多汽车在赛道上抛锚，一些车手待在车底下的时间比待在车里还长。

segments.text: A few cars, however, completed the race.

translations.zh-Hans: 不过，仍有几辆车完成了比赛。

segments.text: The winning car reached a speed of 40 miles an hour, much faster than any of its rivals.

translations.zh-Hans: 获胜的汽车时速达到40英里，比其他任何参赛车辆都快得多。

segments.text: It sped downhill at the end of the race, and its driver had a lot of trouble trying to stop it.

translations.zh-Hans: 比赛结束时，它飞速冲下山坡，车手费了很大劲才把车停下来。

segments.text: The race gave everyone a great deal of pleasure.

translations.zh-Hans: 这场比赛给大家带来了极大的乐趣。
